lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: This city feels different at night. Quieter. Like it's holding its breath.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: I need to keep moving. Just... keep moving.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: The streetlamps are the only things keeping the dark away.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: No, no, no — not now. Please.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: The walls... they're closer than they look.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: They're all looking at me. I know they are.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: I've been running from myself this whole time.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: But I made it. I actually made it.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Maybe I'm stronger than I thought.
